description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a light-colored brick facade and large, rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The front features a paved driveway with two parked cars and a small area containing trash bins and a green recycling container. The house has a flat roof and a prominent, slightly protruding section on the left side, adding architectural interest. The rear of the house includes a large sliding glass door leading to a walled backyard or patio area. The side elevations show a mix of window sizes and a clean, minimalist design with little ornamentation. The overall appearance is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a brick exterior, large windows, a flat roof, and a paved driveway with cars and bins in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two cars on the driveway, trash bins, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding section, side windows, and the driveway extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large sliding glass door, backyard area, and symmetrical window arrangement on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway, cars, and a mostly solid wall with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, no porch, flush with the facade, and a paved driveway leading up to it
